title: T-119 — UI: Brief list page (brief_list) — slice of T-034
prompt:
# T-119 — Brief list page UI (slice of T-034)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2 + UX brief_list
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:7-82 (brief_list)
Parent root: T-034

## Goal
Server Component page `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/page.tsx` rendering a list of briefs via `brief-list-table.tsx` (Client) using shadcn primitives matching the brief_list prototype 1:1. Status filter chips, search input, 5 columns (dev_code, status, template, created_at, owner) with linked-project spine info. Create button triggers BriefCreateModal via URL param.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:7-82`
- `window.NPD_BRIEFS` in-memory filter → Drizzle query with WHERE status=? AND template=? AND (dev_code ILIKE ? OR product_name ILIKE ?); use nuqs for URL-synced filters
- `statusBadge` helper → extract `BriefStatusBadge` component; map status to shadcn Badge variant
- Table row click → `router.push('/npd/briefs/[briefId]')`; stop-propagation on action buttons
- Convert button (status='complete' only) → opens brief_convert_modal via URL param `?modal=briefConvert&brief=BR-0106`
- Empty state → full-width TableRow with EmptyState component (shadcn pattern)
- Linked project column shows DEV-NNN + current_gate (e2e-spine patch: project is canonical next artefact, not FA)

## Implementation contract
New `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/page.tsx` (RSC) fetches briefs and renders `brief-list-table.tsx` 'use client'. Table uses shadcn Table+Badge+Input+Select+Button. Row click navigates to detail; Convert CTA only visible for complete briefs. Per e2e-spine patch, the linked-project column links to Stage-Gate project detail.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/page.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/_components/brief-list-table.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/briefs/_components/__tests__/brief-list-table.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the brief list renders, when compared to brief-screens.jsx:7-82 (brief_list), then it has the same 5 columns in the same order, the status filter chips region, the search input, and the Create button — using shadcn Table+Badge+Input+Select+Button primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given a brief row links to a project, when rendered, then the linked-project cell shows DEV-NNN + current_gate and clicking it navigates to the Stage-Gate project detail (not FA).
3. Given the Create button is clicked, when activated, then the URL is updated with ?modal=briefCreate and BriefCreateModal opens.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering: (a) 5-column parity + status chips, (b) project-spine linked-project cell, (c) Create button URL transition.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test brief-list-table`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement the detail page in this slice (T-120)
- Do not wire navigation glue here (T-121)
- Do not implement Brief Convert modal here
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not use FA as primary user-facing term
